scope: Lead export enrichment columns and REP scope
Desktop, half-width, and mobile horizontal overflow smoke
Production live CSV import/list/export cleanup smoke

focusedTests.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/leadCampaignScope.test.ts tests/leadEnrichmentExport.test.ts tests/campaignAiCohorts.test.ts
notes: Redis ECONNREFUSED warnings are expected in local test environment and did not fail the focused suites.

exportSearchParityRegression.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/leadEnrichmentExport.test.ts tests/leadCampaignScope.test.ts
exportSearchParityRegression.fix: /api/leads/export search now includes company, matching /api/leads list search behavior.

visualPrototypeCheck.tooling: Playwright chromium against Vite dev server with deterministic API mocks
notes: Leads table keeps the retained prototype column set: Name, Phone, Status, Last Contact, Industry, Monthly Revenue, Source, Added.
Campaigns page keeps retained prototype scope: AI Retarget Suggestions above All Campaigns, role-scoped campaign list, and no suppressed/list-management scope creep.
Wide tables are intentionally contained in horizontal table scroll containers; document-level page overflow is false across checked viewports.

exportCsvEvidence.coveredBy: server/tests/leadEnrichmentExport.test.ts and production live CSV smoke

remainingRisks: No M2.1/M2.2 blocker remains after production live CSV smoke and visual prototype checks. M1.1 email OTP fallback is still gated by production SMTP smoke.
